TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Guðni Thorlacius Jóhannesson Guðni Thorlacius Jóhannesson (ryax sa 26 na byacing tay 6 squ kawas na 1968 - squ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1968) mrhuw Iceland ta' misuw hya' ga Guðni Thorlacius Jóhannesson, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Guðni Thorlacius Jóhannesson minkahul sa Reykjavík na Iceland. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1968 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: ɣu*ni tħorlaʦ~ʨius~ɕ **ħannes~ɕs~ɕon ɣu*ni tħorlaʦ~ʨius~ɕ **ħannes~ɕs~ɕon (rjax s~ɕa ** na βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ na **** - s~ɕqu), ħja ɣa s~ɕquliq na pklaħaŋ ɣaɣa. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw iʦ~ʨelan* taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ɣu*ni tħorlaʦ~ʨius~ɕ **ħannes~ɕs~ɕon, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral ɣu*ni tħorlaʦ~ʨius~ɕ **ħannes~ɕs~ɕon minkaħul s~ɕa rejkja**k na iʦ~ʨelan*. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun
S.FORM: Guðni Thorlacius Jóhannesson Guðni Thorlacius Jóhannesson (ryax sa 26 na byacing tay 6 squ kawas na 1968 - squ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1968) mrhuw Iceland ta' misuw hya' ga Guðni Thorlacius Jóhannesson, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Guðni Thorlacius Jóhannesson minkahul sa Reykjavík na Iceland. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1968 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: ɣu*ni tħorlaʦ~ʨius~ɕ **ħannes~ɕs~ɕon ɣu*ni tħorlaʦ~ʨius~ɕ **ħannes~ɕs~ɕon (rjax s~ɕa ** na βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ na **** - s~ɕqu), ħja ɣa s~ɕquliq na pklaħaŋ ɣaɣa. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw iʦ~ʨelan* taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ɣu*ni tħorlaʦ~ʨius~ɕ **ħannes~ɕs~ɕon, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral ɣu*ni tħorlaʦ~ʨius~ɕ **ħannes~ɕs~ɕon minkaħul s~ɕa rejkja**k na iʦ~ʨelan*. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun
